scripts.dev: concurrently -n catalog,checkout,auth,profile,seller,shell -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,green "npm run start -w catalog" "npm run start -w @voltix/checkout" "npm run start -w @voltix/auth" "npm run start -w @voltix/profile" "npm run start -w @voltix/seller-dashboard" "wait-on -t 180000 http://127.0.0.1:3001/remoteEntry.js http://127.0.0.1:3002/remoteEntry.js http://127.0.0.1:3004/remoteEntry.js http://127.0.0.1:3005/remoteEntry.js http://127.0.0.1:3006/remoteEntry.js && npm run start -w shell"
scripts.dev:remotes: concurrently -n catalog,checkout,auth -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm run start -w catalog" "npm run start -w @voltix/checkout" "npm run start -w @voltix/auth"
scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w @voltix/utils && npm run build -w @voltix/api-client && npm run build -w @voltix/shared-state && npm run build -w @voltix/ui-kit
scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build -w shell && npm run build -w catalog && npm run build -w @voltix/checkout && npm run build -w @voltix/auth
